modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Elevator emergency phones are not functioning properly.

full_description_text: 
The user reported that the elevator emergency phones are not working. They are unable to make calls or hear anything when trying to contact the University Police Department. This issue raises concerns about safety and communication in emergency situations.
short_description: Elevator emergency phones are not functioning properly.
description: The user reported that the elevator emergency phones are not working. They are unable to make calls or hear anything when trying to contact the University Police Department. This issue raises concerns about safety and communication in emergency situations.
